title: Day 3 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:  

Sentence 1 - ここ は ちゅうりんじょう です。 (Koko wa chuurinjoo des) = This is the parking area for bicycles.

Sentence 2 - そこ は きつえんじょ です。(Soko wa kitsuenjo des) = That's the smoking area.

Sentence 3 - あそこ は ロビー です。(Asoko wa lobby des) = Over there is the lobby.

How to use this lesson - Please watch the video twice (first with the subtitles and then without them) and repeat the sentences.
